_comment: pVM -> normalized TeeEvidence export shape emitted by eliza_pvm_mgr on the AOSP bring-up track. Conforms to packages/agent/src/services/tee-evidence.ts TeeEvidence. Confidentiality claims (memoryEncrypted/ioProtected/npuProtected) are intentionally ABSENT because they are BLOCKED on the riscv64 Cuttlefish/qemu-virt host. This is a contract/shape fixture, not a real attestation.
